title: Stable Reasoning, Unstable Responses: Mitigating LLM Deception via Stability Asymmetry
affiliations: Institute for Artificial Intelligence, Peking University
School of Chinese as a Second Language, Peking University

methodology.approach: Penalizes high internal stability co-occurring with low external stability during optimization
methodology.metrics: Perturbation-based stability metrics applied independently to Chain of Thought (CoT) and final response

key_findings: Intrinsic deception exhibits high internal stability with low external stability
This signature cleanly separates deception from truthfulness and hallucination
Deceptive models maintain stable internal reasoning while providing unstable external responses
